title: [DISCONTINUED] Runes and Dunes
description: Hidden deep within the desert sands, new discoveries have been unearthed awaiting a traveler to discover their secrets. Version 1.2 is out now to play!
body:
![Minecraft: Runes and Dunes Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Po3kL3DJ/images/6825aaa7ce6df12a124216b74389acad44fc2486.png)

***Minecraft: Runes and Dunes*** is an expansion on the Desert biome, the Archaeology system Mojang put in place, and a small update for the Jungle and End as well to tie it all together. Right now the mod is at a point where the deserts are almost complete

![Excavation Site](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Po3kL3DJ/images/f7d05fd3ecad286dfe5637b24dae78b283d86adb.png)

## FEATURES

<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

-Scorchstone Gem  
-Veredite Gem  
-Eclipsal Gem  
-Sandy Tablet  
-Shattered Tablet  \
-Scorchstone Rune  \
-Veredite Rune \
-Eclipsal Rune \
-Papyrus  \
-Papyrus Culm (Found by the Sniffer)  \
-Dust  
</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

-Scorchstone Rune Block  \
-Veredite Rune Block  \
-Eclipsal Rune Block  \
-Sifter \
-Excavation Lantern\
-Dust Block  \
-Dust Bricks (With Variants)  
-Chiseled Dust Bricks  
-Mahogany Planks\
-Mahogany Logs\
-Mahogany Sapling\
-Wiltflower  

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Entities</summary>

-Meerkat  
-Legless\
-Historian Villager

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>

-Excavation Sites \
-Desert Monoliths

</details>

---

**Update 1.2 is going to be the last major update for a while since I want to actually sit down and learn Java beyond the basics, and I may try to play around with other ideas I have on the backburner while I do so**

***CREDITS***
